creator: 0mp@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 187452
Patch updating x11/xclip from 0.12_2 to 0.13.

I'm submitting a patch updating x11/xclip to 0.13. 

The new version introduces a '-t' option, which I was missing from FreeBSD. Also, the xclip project moved to GitHub from SourceForge, so I changed related information accordingly.

The patch was tested with portlint and it did not produce any errors when tested with the commands from Chapter 3.4. of the Porter's Handbook.
